window_expansion_note: 72h strict window yielded 5 verified items; no expansion required

exploration.non_registry_items_notes: Sakana AI Fugu, Qualcomm Dragonfly, and Legion LegalTech were not in source registry

published_items.title: Sakana AI Fugu launches as multi-agent orchestration API
key_claims: OpenAI-compatible single API endpoint
Two tiers: Fugu (balanced) and Fugu Ultra (complex tasks)
Fugu Ultra: 73.7% SWE-Bench Pro (self-reported, not independently verified)
Pricing: $20-$200/month subscription + pay-as-you-go
Not yet available in EU/EEA
Independent tests: up to 30-minute waits on complex shader tasks
caveats: Benchmarks are vendor self-reported; not independently reproduced at time of publication
Ensemble comparison methodology not disclosed vs monolithic model baselines

published_items.title: Qualcomm unveils Dragonfly data center AI chip brand, signs Meta as first customer
key_claims: Dragonfly C1000: 250+ cores, PCIe Gen7, CXL, chiplet design
Meta announced as first named customer, multi-generation supply agreement
Production target: H2 2028
CEO declared 2026 'year of AI agents'
caveats: Microsoft as early customer mentioned by Seeking Alpha (T3) but not confirmed in primary press release
H2 2028 production target is 2+ years out; subject to change

published_items.title: Legion LegalTech sues US government to overturn Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access ban
published_items.confirmation_method: four T3 outlets (The Next Web, Gizmodo, Medianama, Eastern Herald)
key_claims: Suit filed June 23, 2026 in federal court, Washington DC
Plaintiff: Legion LegalTech Corp
Argument: ECCN 4E091 (AI weight export control) rescinded May 2025 with no replacement; directive lacks statutory authority
Relief sought: declaratory judgment + injunction to halt enforcement
Impact described as 'immediate, irreparable, and existential' to Legion's business
caveats: Court docket not independently accessed; all details from T3 trade press
Legal outcome highly uncertain; filed 24 hours before this bulletin

published_items.title: Google Home Speaker ships June 25 at $99.99 with Gemini for Home
key_claims: On sale June 25, 2026
Full Gemini conversational features require Google Home Premium subscription
Colors: Jade, Berry, Porcelain, Hazel (US); Porcelain and Hazel only outside US
Gemini for Home: multi-step voice commands, self-correction mid-sentence

published_items.title: ByteDance Seedance 2.5 announced: 30-second native AI video, enterprise beta open
key_claims: 30-second native video generation (vs 15-second in Seedance 2.0)
Up to 50 reference inputs per generation
Localized frame editing without touching rest of shot
Seedance 2.0 simultaneously gains 4K output upgrade
Enterprise beta open June 23, 2026
Public launch target: early July 2026
caveats: No pricing or public API announced at time of publication
No benchmark numbers published; performance claims unverifiable without model access
Enterprise beta access is gated — not self-serve
